free_text: with a 24 MeV vector-polarized deuteron beam provided
by the Lamb-shift ion source at the Munich MP tandem
The hafnium target with about 105 mu-g/cm2 thickness
enriched in 180 Hf to 96.2% was prepared by evaporating
HfO2 onto 5.6 mu-g/cm2 carbon foil backing.
The protons were analyzed with the Q3D magnetic
spectrograph and detected by the 1.8 m long position
sensitive detector placed along the focal plane. It
consists of an array of single-wire proportional
counters with an additional cathode readout, followed
